sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, robots.txt, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
v2.8.0: Shared Canonical URL Set (rr_get_canonical_url_set) — sitemap, llms.txt, and sitemap preview now use one shared URL set with consistent noindex/utility/duplicate-suffix filtering. robots.txt ensure_sitemap_directive flag. /status expanded with sitemap_index_url, physical_robots_txt_exists, warnings.
v2.7.0: GET/POST /robots-txt endpoint.
v2.6.0: Styled sitemaps + per-type sub-sitemaps.
